title: Lazy's End Remastered
description: This resource pack includes additional textures for the end dimension.
body: # Lazy's End Remastered This resource pack adds five types of End grass, and redesigned obsidian textures only in the End. The Overworld remains completely untouched, keeping all vanilla textures intact. These changes give the End dimension a more vibrant and mysterious look without altering gameplay, with subtle enhancements that make every corner feel alive… and more to come! ## Requires Optifine or Continuity! if you would like to suggest a feature create an issue with the "Enhancement" label on github for me to see
